notes:
Note 1. This list does not include applications that have failed sift and therefore were not considered by the moderator
*Note 2. Application AH/N005880/1 was not funded whilst application AH/N004264/1 was, due to fit to the highlight notice "Cross-Disciplinary Research Networks Exploring Emerging Areas of Cross-Council Enquiry Highlight Notice".  Although AH/N005880/1 was ranked slightly higher than AH/N004264/1, AH/N005880/1 was judged to not fit within the scope of the highlight notice, whereas AH/N004264/1 was judged to have a good fit to the highlight.
